## Why

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm validate:data`, if relevant
- [ ] `pnpm build`, if runtime code changed
- [ ] Cloudflare preview, if server/runtime code changed

## Data and schema impact

- [ ] No data or schema impact
- [ ] Migration included and reviewed
- [ ] Source policy followed
- [ ] Sample data remains isolated
- [ ] Revision/methodology implications documented

## Deployment and security

- [ ] No deployment impact
- [ ] Environment variables documented with placeholders only
- [ ] Cloudflare/Supabase behavior documented
- [ ] Rollback or compatibility notes included
- [ ] No secrets, private data, or restricted datasets included

## Project memory

- [ ] `PROJECT_TRACKER.md` updated
- [ ] `PR_LOG.md` updated
- [ ] `CODEX_MEMORY.md` updated when future sessions need the learning
- [ ] `DECISION_LOG.md` updated for material decisions
